rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette resistenza o cedevolezza al contatto
DURO evoca immobilità, resistenza, densità fisica, intransigenza; MORBIDO evoca cedimento, avvolgimento, assorbimento, conformarsi
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, immagini fisiche) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità meccanica del contatto emerga senza nominarla
prompt_trace: Describe what it feels like to press against something that does not move.
Write about a space that conforms to whoever enters it.
Describe the experience of resting in a place you did not choose.
Write about an object that holds its shape no matter what.
Describe the sensation of lying on something after a long journey.
Write about a boundary that gives way or does not give way.
Describe the feeling of a hand gripping something under pressure.
Write about a material that seems to push back when touched.
Describe the experience of a body finding a position after a long time.
Write about a structure that changes — or does not change — under weight.
Describe the sensation of pressure applied slowly to something.
Write about what a surface reveals about what lies beneath it.
